sentences.target: Ich will dir das Buch geben.

translations.de: Ich will dir das Buch geben.
translations.en: I want to give you the book.
translations.fr: Je veux te donner le livre.
translations.he: אני רוצה לתת לך את הספר.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đưa cho bạn cuốn sách.
translations.nl: Ik wil je het boek geven.
translations.hu: Oda akarom adni neked a könyvet.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें किताब देना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να σου δώσω το βιβλίο.
translations.id: Aku mau kasih kamu buku itu.
translations.ja: あなたに本をあげたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses volition and selects the infinitive 'geben'.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, dative; indirect object (recipient).
Definite article, neuter singular, accusative; determiner of the direct object 'Buch'.
Common noun, neuter, singular, accusative; theme/direct object of 'geben'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; denotes transfer (takes dative recipient and accusative theme).

sentences.target: Sie kann mir ihre Nummer geben.

translations.de: Sie kann mir ihre Nummer geben.
translations.en: She can give me her number.
translations.fr: Elle peut me donner son numéro.
translations.it: Lei può darmi il suo numero.
translations.ko: 그녀는 저에게 번호를 줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她可以把她的号码给我。
translations.yue: 佢可以畀佢嘅電話號碼我。
translations.ru: Она может дать мне свой номер.
translations.pt: Ela pode me dar o número dela.
translations.he: היא יכולה לתת לי את המספר שלה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy có thể cho tôi số điện thoại của cô ấy.
translations.nl: Ze kan me haar nummer geven.
translations.uk: Вона може дати мені свій номер.
translations.hi: वह मुझे अपना नंबर दे सकती है.
translations.el: Μπορεί να μου δώσει τον αριθμό της.
translations.nb: Hun kan gi meg nummeret sitt.
translations.sv: Hon kan ge mig sitt nummer.
translations.ro: Ea poate să-mi dea numărul ei.
translations.da: Hun kan give mig sit nummer.
translations.ja: 彼女は私に電話番号を教えてくれます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses ability and selects the infinitive 'geben'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; indirect object (recipient).
Possessive determiner, feminine singular, accusative; agrees with 'Nummer' and marks possession by a 3rd person singular feminine possessor.
Common noun, feminine, singular, accusative; theme/direct object of 'geben'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'kann'; denotes transfer (takes dative recipient and accusative theme).

sentences.target: Wir müssen dem Kind den Ball geben.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ deːm kɪnt deːn bal ˈɡeːbən/

translations.de: Wir müssen dem Kind den Ball geben.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ deːm kɪnt deːn bal ˈɡeːbən/
translations.en: We have to give the kid the ball.
translations.es: Tenemos que darle la pelota al niño.
translations.fr: Nous devons donner le ballon à l'enfant.
translations.it: Dobbiamo dare la palla al bambino.
translations.yue: 我哋要將個波畀個小朋友。
translations.pt: Temos que dar a bola para a criança.
translations.he: אנחנו חייבים לתת לילד את הכדור.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải đưa quả bóng cho đứa trẻ.
translations.nl: We moeten het kind de bal geven.
translations.hu: Oda kell adnunk a labdát a gyereknek.
translations.hi: हमें बच्चे को गेंद देनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να δώσουμε την μπάλα στο παιδί.
translations.nb: Vi må gi ballen til barnet.
translations.id: Kita harus kasih bola ke anak itu.
translations.sv: Vi måste ge bollen till barnet.
translations.ja: 子どもにボールをあげないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses necessity and selects the infinitive 'geben'.
Definite article, neuter singular, dative; determiner of the indirect object 'Kind'.
Common noun, neuter, singular, dative; recipient/indirect object of 'geben'.
Definite article, masculine singular, accusative; determiner of the direct object 'Ball'.
Common noun, masculine, singular, accusative; theme/direct object of 'geben'.
Main verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'müssen'; denotes transfer (takes dative recipient and accusative theme).

sentences.target: Papa wird mir später das Handy geben.
sentences.reading: /ˈpapa vɪʁt miːɐ̯ ˈʃpɛːtɐ das ˈhɛndi ˈɡeːbən/

translations.de: Papa wird mir später das Handy geben.
translations.ipa: /ˈpapa vɪʁt miːɐ̯ ˈʃpɛːtɐ das ˈhɛndi ˈɡeːbən/
translations.en: Dad will give me the phone later.
translations.es: Papá me dará el teléfono más tarde.
translations.fr: Papa me donnera le téléphone plus tard.
translations.it: Papà mi darà il telefono più tardi.
translations.zh-Hans: 爸爸等会儿会把手机给我。
translations.yue: 爸爸陣間會畀部手機我。
translations.pt: Meu pai vai me dar o celular mais tarde.
translations.he: אבא ייתן לי את הטלפון אחר כך.
translations.vi: Bố sẽ đưa điện thoại cho tôi sau.
translations.nl: Papa geeft me later de telefoon.
translations.hu: Apa később odaadja nekem a telefont.
translations.hi: पापा मुझे बाद में फ़ोन देंगे.
translations.el: Ο μπαμπάς θα μου δώσει το τηλέφωνο αργότερα.
translations.id: Ayah akan kasih saya ponsel nanti.
translations.ro: Tata îmi va da telefonul mai târziu.
translations.ja: パパはあとで私にスマホをくれます。
